title: useDirection
description: Detects or controls the current text direction (LTR or RTL), useful for localization and layout.
summary: Handles reading and updating text direction (LTR/RTL).

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `useDirection` works.

<UseDirectionDemosUsage />

## API References

- [`mdn`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Global_attributes/dir)

### Props API

| Props API           | Type             | Default | Annotation                                                                                                                  |
| ------------------- | ---------------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| defaultDirection`?` | `"ltr" \| "rtl"` | `ltr`   | Direction set as a default value                                                                                            |
| detectDirection`?`  | `boolean`        | `true`  | Determines whether direction should be updated on mount based on `dir` attribute set on root element (usually html element) |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the function immediately.

<SourceCodes name="use-direction" />

`,(0,r.jsx)(n,{name:"use-direction",code:`"use client";\r
import React from "react";\r
\r
export type Direction = "ltr" | "rtl";\r
\r
export interface useDirectionProps {\r
  /** Direction set as a default value, \`ltr\` by default */\r
  defaultDirection?: Direction;\r
  /** Determines whether direction should be updated on mount based on \`dir\` attribute set on root element (usually html element), \`true\` by default */\r
  detectDirection?: boolean;\r
}\r
export function useDirection(_dir: useDirectionProps) {\r
  const { defaultDirection = "ltr", detectDirection = true } = _dir;\r
  const useIsomorphicEffect = typeof document !== "undefined" ? React.useLayoutEffect : React.useEffect;\r
\r
  const [dir, setDir] = React.useState<Direction>(defaultDirection);\r
\r
  const setCookie = (name: string, value: string, days = 30) => {\r
    const date = new Date();\r
    date.setTime(date.getTime() + days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);\r
    document.cookie = \`\${name}=\${encodeURIComponent(value)};expires=\${date.toUTCString()};path=/\`;\r
  };\r
\r
  useIsomorphicEffect(() => {\r
    if (!detectDirection) return;\r
\r
    const html = document.documentElement;\r
\r
    const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {\r
      const current = html.getAttribute("dir");\r
\r
      if (current === "ltr" || current === "rtl") {\r
        setDir(current);\r
      }\r
    });\r
\r
    observer.observe(html, {\r
      attributes: true,\r
      attributeFilter: ["dir"]\r
    });\r
\r
    return () => observer.disconnect();\r
  }, [detectDirection]);\r
\r
  // Sinkronisasi setiap kali dir berubah\r
  useIsomorphicEffect(() => {\r
    document.documentElement.setAttribute("dir", dir);\r
    setCookie("__dir", dir);\r
  }, [dir]);\r
\r
  const setDirection = React.useCallback((direction: Direction) => {\r
    setDir(direction);\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  const toggleDirection = React.useCallback(() => {\r
    setDir(prev => (prev === "ltr" ? "rtl" : "ltr"));\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  return {\r
    dir,\r
    setDirection,\r
    toggleDirection\r
  };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-direction.ts"})]})}function u(t={}){let{wrapper:e}=t.components||{};return e?(0,r.jsx)(e,{...t,children:(0,r.jsx)(d,{...t})}):d(t)}function h(t,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+t+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return v(y);})();
